# vendor/

Raw, unmodified snapshots of engine drops from Santiago Bustelo, dropped
in as `vendor/r.<date>/` when a new update arrives.

This directory is **git-ignored** (except this file) and stays local-only —
it holds his source verbatim, and the permission on record covers using it
in `@ipax/core`/`ipax-cli` with attribution, not archiving raw copies in a
public repo. See `packages/core/README.md` for the vendor-vs-vendor diff
workflow this directory supports.
